creator: gspurki@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 217255
Update Jove to 4.17.0.5

I have one question. 

I could delete all the patches in the "file" folder, and made the diff with "diff -u -N -r" so i get stuff like:

--- /usr/ports/editors/jove/files/patch-sysdep.h	2016-07-30 01:15:11.000000000 +0200
+++ /usr/ports/editors/jove/files/patch-sysdep.h        1970-01-01 01:00:00.000000000 +0100

The file patch-sysdep.h is now empty with the date 1970, does that means its going to be deleted and the folder "files" too?
